pageDescription: Instructions on how to setup CodeFolio on your device locally.
content:
[{"id":"7d89ec80-6358-4096-a0f5-b73e3a6a49f1","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Setting up CodeFolio is straightforward. You will need Node, Git, and a basic familiarity with using a terminal for the initial setup. Once the installation is complete, everything else can be managed through the UI. Before starting the installation, please make sure these requirements are installed on your system.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"ba8ca9ff-64f0-4dea-8060-773779bf520f","component":"CodeBlock","data":{"code":"git clone "https://github.com/hudson1998x/Codefolio"

cd Codefolio

npm run codefolio:factoryreset","language":"shell","filename":"install","showCopy":"true","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"5e8c2cef-58f0-4768-8e45-77d3989fdbb9","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"5a24fee2-e838-4e22-ba4e-cd3037ecfffd","component":"Text","data":{"content":"This will remove the existing content from the CodeFolio repository that is included to demonstrate its documentation. Once removed, your repository will be clear and ready for you to begin building your website, whether you plan to create a portfolio, write documentation, or publish a simple static blog. This also re-initialises your repository, so you can add a remote git service, and your changes are then tracked to your repository, not trying to push content to the CodeFolio repository","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"b67912d7-4069-4961-9c8c-bf71740f5660","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Next we need to run the server so you can manage your website. We do this by using another node command.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"b88db2f5-998c-4356-aaf3-5e4ab0fe3b37","component":"CodeBlock","data":{"code":"npm start","language":"bash","filename":"Run Local Server","showCopy":"true","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"507d12cc-fd08-4d09-b812-8da2da11898a","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"06be307c-98dd-496a-979a-f21784fa481a","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Running this will start up the local web server, this is where you can manage content like pages etc... ","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"49a45d2a-c76b-41fe-9e43-a52fb75f92ce","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Then you can access your admin panel. This is available locally, so there is no need to create an account or go through additional authentication steps. The link below will take you directly to your admin dashboard.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f8aabec5-4423-4249-8369-95ce845fe45c","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Because CodeFolio works directly with your local Git repository, it does not require a traditional authentication system. Any changes made through the admin panel are simply committed to your repository, so access control is effectively handled by the security of the machine or server where the project is running. In most cases this environment is local or otherwise limited in scope, which keeps the setup simple while still maintaining practical security.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"ec59af6b-ed1f-4ace-9958-6462f55827f1","component":"Text","data":{"content":"http://localhost:3000/en-admin/ ","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"e427a7bd-af93-4312-9604-e69fb892dbb8","component":"Text","data":{"content":"The link above will take you straight to your admin dashboard, once you see the dashboard; your website is ready.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]
